name: io.github.shubochandrosarker/bridgistic
description: Connect Claude to WordPress safely: signed requests, scoped keys, approvals, logs, snapshots.

environmentVariables.name: BRIDGISTIC_SITE_URL
environmentVariables.description: WordPress site URL exactly as shown in WP Admin → Settings → General, e.g. https://example.com

environmentVariables.name: BRIDGISTIC_KEY_ID
environmentVariables.description: Public key id (wpk_…) from WP Admin → Bridgistic → Claude Setup

environmentVariables.name: BRIDGISTIC_KEY_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Key secret (wps_…) shown once at key creation

environmentVariables.name: BRIDGISTIC_CONNECTIONS
environmentVariables.description: Optional absolute path to a multi-site connections JSON registry (alias → siteUrl/keyId/secret)

environmentVariables.name: BRIDGISTIC_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: error | warn | info | debug (stderr only, never logs secrets)
